channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ways to Manage Blue Light for Better Sleep
March for Life attendees may have been exposed to measles, DC Health warns
item.description: D.C. health officials are contacting people possibly exposed to measles at the March for Life in January, as confirmed cases rise nationwide.

item.title: Need a new path in midlife? There's a school for that and a quiz to kickstart it
item.description: Schools across the country are offering courses and retreats for people 50+ who want to reinvent themselves and embrace lifelong learning and discover...

item.title: Olympic COVID restrictions are gone, but some athletes are still self-quarantining
item.description: For most people, the pandemic days of masking are behind them. In certain corners of the Winter Olympics, though, things still look a lot like they di...

item.title: Best Fruits to Eat During Cancer Treatment
item.description: Fruits can support nutrition during cancer care. Learn which options may ease treatment side effects and offer potential protective benefits.

item.title: New study finds many tuberculosis diagnoses may be incorrect
item.description: New research is now casting doubt on the true number of tuberculosis cases. That could carry significant implications for patient care and well-being.

item.title: Symptoms That May Point to Chronic Migraine
I'm A Complete Mess If I Don't Sleep — This Supplement Gives Me My Deepest Rest*
item.description: It's worked wonders for my sleep and energy levels.*

item.title: How To Mediate Sibling Conflicts, According To A Family Therapist
item.description: A therapist and mom of three explains how to navigate sibling conflicts and the technique that create a culture of respectful disagreement.

item.title: Experts Agree: This Is The Healthiest Way To Take Your Coffee
item.description: It'll benefit your gut health, brain function, and more.

item.title: Hypochlorous Acid Spray Is A Great Post-Workout Hack, Says A Derm
item.description: Sometimes you just won't have time to wash your face directly after a workout.

item.title: This Many Steps A Day Significantly Reduces Cancer Risk
item.description: Plus, 4 ways to up your step count

item.title: Trump administration lauds plastic surgeons' statement on trans surgery for minors
item.description: A patient who came to regret the top surgery she got as a teen won a $2 million malpractice suit. Then, the American Society of Plastic Surgeons clari...
